priorities.title: S17 P0 push-gate resolution: ship 7-commit S17 queue + bind spark-online.space custom domain + enforce HTTPS + apply §13.9 LOCKED amendment.
priorities.check_method: Push fd016c2..f73bc3a; gh api PUT cname=spark-online.space; Let's Encrypt cert approved exp 2026-08-10; https_enforced=true; HTTPS 200 verified; §13.9 amended commit f09e452.

priorities.title: P8 Audio: Suno track 'Blue Steppe Orbit' as background music + 2 synthesized SFX (clave-tap on bond-form, descending-pitch fart on player-cause sever). Web Audio API singleton audioManager.ts (~220 LOC), effect-array bridge (BOND_FORMED + BOND_SEVERED kinds), 'M' mute toggle with localStorage persist + Safari-safe try/catch, music-start on PLAYING transition (covers solo + 1v1 host + 1v1 client paths), mute glyph ♪ top-right y=30 dimming on mute. Replay-safe via lastDrainedTick cursor. Multi-bond aggregation (1 clave per placement). Plays SFX for both local and remote bond changes (1v1 awareness).
priorities.check_method: Council R1 + PRIME-AUDIT applied. STATE-DISCOVERY GATE A.0 verified 5 claims (bonds.delete only in SEVER_BOND, physics SEVER_BOND zero in prod, 'M' key conflict-free across 4 keydown handlers, effects not in save schema, no NET-protocol type clash). Tests 330 → 346 (+16): claveEnvelope monotonic decay at t=0/0.015/0.025/0.03; fartFreq exp ramp 600→180Hz monotonic with geometric-mean midpoint √(600*180); drain cursor advance (idempotent re-drain skips ticks ≤ cursor); non-audio effects (BOND_COMMIT, SEVER_ERASE) graceful no-op; replay safety via cursor; reset cursor allows re-fire. Typecheck exit 0 (added BOND_FORMED+BOND_SEVERED cases to lifetime.ts + effectsRenderer.draw() exhaustiveness; effectsRenderer.sync filters audio-only kinds at drain). Build success (777 modules, 388KB main bundle +3KB from audioManager; dist/audio/blue-steppe-orbit.mp3 10MB present). Push commit 105b276 to origin/master; GH Actions deploy run 25743852262 success in <60s. Live verification: curl spark-online.space HTTP 200; curl /audio/blue-steppe-orbit.mp3 200 OK Content-Length=10008775 Content-Type=audio/mp3; updated JS bundle index-CHS860hi.js. Preview eval verified stage children include BETA badge (1908,12,alpha=0.55) AND mute indicator ♪ (1908,30,alpha=0.55) — visual layer present. Audio playback NOT auto-tested (jsdom limit + headless autoplay policy); manual smoke test on live URL = user-gesture click → music starts; place primitive → clave; sever enemy bond → fart; 'M' → mute glyph dims to ♪̸ alpha=0.25.
